info.title: Shopify REST Admin API
info.description: The Shopify Admin API lets you build apps and integrations that extend and enhance the Shopify admin.

get.description: Retrieves a list of products. Use query parameters to filter the results by various product attributes.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of product IDs to retrieve.

parameters.name: collection_id
parameters.description: Filter results to products that belong to the specified collection.

parameters.name: product_type
parameters.description: Filter results by product type.

parameters.name: vendor
parameters.description: Filter results by product vendor.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Filter results by product handle.

parameters.name: created_at_min
parameters.description: Show products created after this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: created_at_max
parameters.description: Show products created before this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: updated_at_min
parameters.description: Show products last updated after this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: updated_at_max
parameters.description: Show products last updated before this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: published_at_min
parameters.description: Show products published after this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: published_at_max
parameters.description: Show products published before this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: published_status
parameters.description: Filter results by the published status of the product.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return. Maximum 250, default 50.

parameters.name: since_id
parameters.description: Restrict results to those after the specified ID.

parameters.name: presentment_currencies
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of presentment currency ISO codes to return variant prices in.

post.description: Creates a new product. You can include variants, options, images, and metafields in the creation request.

body_html.description: The description of the product, in HTML format.

vendor.description: The name of the product vendor.

tags.description: A comma-separated list of tags for the product.

options.description: The custom product properties such as Size, Color, Material.

metafields.description: A list of metafields to attach to the product.

parameters.name: updated_at_min

parameters.name: updated_at_max

parameters.name: published_at_min

get.description: Retrieves a list of product variants for a given product.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric identifier of the product.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return. Maximum 250, default 50.

parameters.name: since_id
parameters.description: Restrict results to those after the specified ID.

parameters.name: presentment_currencies
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of presentment currency ISO codes to return variant prices in.

post.description: Creates a new variant for the specified product.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: The unique numeric identifier of the product.

option1.description: The value of the first product option.

option2.description: The value of the second product option.

option3.description: The value of the third product option.

price.description: The price of the product variant.

compare_at_price.description: The original price of the item before a sale or discount.

sku.description: A unique identifier for the product variant in the shop.

barcode.description: The barcode, UPC, or ISBN number for the product.

weight.description: The weight of the product variant in the unit system specified.

weight_unit.description: The unit of measurement for the variant weight.

taxable.description: Whether a tax is charged when the product variant is sold.

requires_shipping.description: Whether the product variant requires shipping.

inventory_management.description: The fulfillment service that tracks the number of items in stock for the variant.

inventory_policy.description: Whether to allow customers to place an order for the variant when it is out of stock.

fulfillment_service.description: The fulfillment service associated with the variant.

image_id.description: The unique numeric identifier for a product image associated with the variant.

metafields.description: A list of metafields to attach to the variant.

post.description: Creates a new image for the specified product. You can provide the image via a URL (src) or a base64-encoded attachment.

parameters.description: The unique numeric identifier of the product.

post.description: Creates a custom collection. A custom collection is a grouping of products that a shop owner can create to make their shops easier to browse.

body_html.description: The description of the collection in HTML format.

handle.description: A unique, human-readable string for the collection in URL format.

image.description: An image associated with the collection.

sort_order.description: The order of products in the collection.

template_suffix.description: The suffix of the template used for the collection page.

metafields.description: A list of metafields to attach to the collection.

collects.description: A list of collects that associate products with the collection.

get.description: Retrieves a list of smart collections. Smart collections are automated collections that use rules to include matching products.

parameters.name: ids
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of smart collection IDs to retrieve.

parameters.name: title
parameters.description: Filter by smart collection title.

parameters.name: handle
parameters.description: Filter by smart collection handle.

parameters.name: product_id
parameters.description: Show smart collections that include the specified product.

parameters.name: updated_at_min
parameters.description: Show smart collections last updated after this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: updated_at_max
parameters.description: Show smart collections last updated before this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: published_at_min
parameters.description: Show smart collections published after this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: published_at_max
parameters.description: Show smart collections published before this date (ISO 8601 format).

parameters.name: published_status
parameters.description: Filter by the published status of smart collections.

parameters.name: fields
parameters.description: A comma-separated list of fields to include in the response.

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: The maximum number of results to return. Maximum 250, default 50.

parameters.name: since_id
parameters.description: Restrict results to those after the specified ID.

post.description: Creates a new smart collection with specified rules for automatically including matching products.

title.description: The name of the smart collection.

body_html.description: The description of the collection in HTML format.

handle.description: A unique, human-readable string for the collection in URL format.

image.description: An image associated with the collection.

sort_order.description: The order of products in the collection.

template_suffix.description: The suffix of the template used for the collection page.

rules.description: The list of rules that define which products are included in the smart collection.

column.description: The property of a product to match against the rule condition.

relation.description: The relationship between the column and the condition.

disjunctive.description: Whether products must match any (true) or all (false) of the rules to be included in the collection.

metafields.description: A list of metafields to attach to the collection.

post.description: Creates a new order. When you create an order, you can include line items, customer information, addresses, financial status, fulfillment status, and more.

line_items.description: A list of line item objects for the order.

variant_id.description: The ID of the product variant.

tax_lines.description: Tax lines applied to this line item.

customer.description: The customer associated with the order.

id.description: The ID of the customer.

email.description: The email address of the customer.

billing_address.description: The billing address for the order.

shipping_address.description: The shipping address for the order.

financial_status.description: The financial status of the order.

fulfillment_status.description: The fulfillment status of the order.

currency.description: The three-letter currency code (ISO 4217) for the order.

send_receipt.description: Whether to send an order confirmation to the customer.

send_fulfillment_receipt.description: Whether to send a shipping confirmation to the customer.

inventory_behaviour.description: How to handle inventory when creating the order.

note.description: An optional note attached to the order.

tags.description: Tags attached to the order, comma-separated.

post.description: Cancels an order. Orders that are paid and have fulfillments cannot be canceled.
